title: Non-record: local RTX 4070 SP1024 8x512 KV4 seq768 500-step run
body:
## Summary
- add a non-record submission folder under `records/track_non_record_16mb/`
- include `README.md`, `submission.json`, `train.log`, and `train_gpt.py`
- document a local 1x RTX 4070 Laptop GPU run of an 8-layer 512-dim configuration found through a throughput-oriented search path

## Notes
- this is **not** intended to satisfy the official 10-minute / 8xH100 record track
- it is a non-record submission showing a compact local-workstation run under the 16MB artifact cap
- full published validation split was used (`fineweb_val_*`), while training used the first published train shard
- final post-quant metric in the included log is `val_bpb=1.61140740`

## Included files
- `README.md`
- `submission.json`
- `train.log`
- `train_gpt.py`
